message:
refactor(database,distributed): update test helpers and formatting

Database test helper (sqlite.rs):
- Update create_test_cx() to use new Cx constructor API
- Replace RuntimeState-based initialization with direct RegionId/TaskId
  construction via ArenaIndex
- Simplifies test setup by removing Arc<Mutex<RuntimeState>> boilerplate

Recovery formatting (recovery.rs):
- Minor rustfmt adjustment for AuthenticatedSymbol construction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
